protocol_notes: Uses reconstituted retatrutide vial. Reports mixing duration of 6-8 weeks, though notes medical community recommends 4-week rule to minimize bacterial growth. Uses 30g 5/16 inch insulin syringes (0.5 ML). Reconstitutes 5mg vial with 0.5 ML bacteriostatic water, resulting in 1mg per 0.1 ML (10 units on syringe = 1mg). Storage: 36-46 degrees Fahrenheit. Does not reuse syringes. Powder can last months-years if stored properly.
